## Notes

Notes apply only for the **smart** IKEA VARMBLIXT (RGB, Matter)!

### Pairing

1. **Press and hold the ON/OFF button for 10 seconds** to factory reset and start Matter pairing.

2. **Power-cycle the lamp 12 times** (easier with a smart plug) to start Zigbee pairing.  
   The lamp will flash white a couple of times.

Alternatively, reset it with [Touchlink](../guide/usage/touchlink.md).
